methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $10M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Nuclear Energy

data.narrative:
Hexium is a seed-stage nuclear energy company founded by Charlie Jarrott and Jacob Peterson that has raised $10M+. The nuclear energy sector includes 3 public comparables (OKLO, NNE, SMR) and 8 private peers, including Oklo, TerraPower, X-Energy, Kairos Power, and Nano Nuclear Energy.

Stage-progression analysis is the applicable valuation method for Hexium. Using total capital raised of $10M as a proxy for seed-stage valuation and applying a 2.5x multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage progression yields $25M. This method directly reflects the company's stage and financing history.

Peer-median analysis was not applicable. While 8 nuclear energy peers exist in the broader sector, the narrow filters for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier comparables returned fewer than three datapoints, making median peer multiples unreliable and potentially misleading.

The triangulated valuation range derived from stage-progression analysis is $21M to $29M, with a median of $25M. The relatively narrow band reflects reliance on a single method. Key uncertainties include the representativeness of the 2.5x multiplier for this specific market segment and the absence of directly comparable private nuclear companies at the seed stage. A fuller analysis would benefit from expanded comparable data or revenue/resource-based approaches once operating metrics materialize.
